title: My Space Functionality

posts.author: _Lars (Lars)
posts.cookedHtml: We are finding the My Space functionality to be limiting to the way we want to manage our tasks. So we have created our own workflow boards that suit our needs and we use automation to push tasks from project boards to our custom workflow boards however given we can’t add updates and files that could mirror back to the project boards we are finding it’s not the complete solution that we need. Can anyone suggest a third-party plugin to give us a better experience in My Work eg. Kanban views?
